title: Key Contributions of K. Knight & S. B. Nair in AI
description: A visual breakdown of the primary concepts and their relationships as introduced by Knight and Nair, highlighting their impact on machine translation and AI problem-solving.
relationships: Source Language Analysis feeds into the Interlingua, which is then used for Target Language Generation. The entire KBMT process is dependent on the Acquisition and Maintenance of a large knowledge base.
